steps.title: Translate the percentage statement into an equation
steps.content:
The phrase 552 is 92% of what number means that 552 equals 92% of an unknown value x. Write this as:
$$552 = 0.92x$$

steps.title: Set up the division to isolate x
Simplify the division
steps.content:
Convert 0.92 to a fraction: $0.92 = \frac{92}{100}$
$$x = \frac{552}{\frac{92}{100}} = 552 \times \frac{100}{92} = \frac{55200}{92} = 600$$
The answer is 600.
